interface.shortDescription: ModernUO and Ultima Online development guidance for RebirthUO.
interface.longDescription: ModernUO provides focused Codex skills for RebirthUO server work, including custom content module setup, migration guidance, cross-era change routing, LootPack source preservation, symbol discipline for constants, variables, fields, properties, and Policy* surfaces, named Ultima Online skill, spell, and item property parity checks, evidence-backed era parity reports with expected-vs-actual data deltas, content parity checks, subsystem audits, serialization, timers, networking, regions, combat, crafting, loot, quests, housing, skills, stats, and related Ultima Online domain research.
defaultPrompt: Check this Ultima Online content parity with source-backed data deltas.
Review this content change for cross-era parity impact.
Review this source-derived loot change before replacing LootPack calls.
Review this code for unnecessary constants, locals, fields, properties, and Policy* symbols.
Check Magery skill parity against ModernUO.
Check Flamestrike spell parity against ModernUO.
Check Spell Damage item property parity against ModernUO.
Set up a CUOContent custom module for this ModernUO server.
